docs.text: SARS2: Workshop on Robustness and Safe Software 2.0 This workshop is in conjunction with ASPLOS2021 Welcome to the Workshop on Robustness and Safe Software 2.0 (SARS2). Unlike Software 1.0 (conventional programs) that is manually coded with hardened parameters and explicit logics, Software 2.0 programs, usually manifested as and enabled by Deep Neural Networks (DNN), have learnt parameters and implicit logics. While the systems and architecture communities have focused, rightly so, on the efficiency of DNNs, Software 2.0 exposes a unique set of challenges for robustness, safety, and resiliency. The workshop fosters an interactive discussion about computer systems and architecture research’s role of robust, safe, and resilient Software 2.0. Important Dates Call for Contribution: February 28th, 2021. Organizer Yuhao Zhu Priya Panda Agenda Time Speaker Content 9:30 ~ 10:00 Yuhao Zhu Opening and Welcome 10:00 ~ 10:30 Yuhao Zhu Architecture Support for Robust Deep Learning 10:30 ~ 11:00 Priya Panda Software 2.0 in Deep Learning
docs.title: SARS2: Workshop on Robustness and Safe Software 2.0
